seoTitle: Oriental Semiconductor Solutions | EV Industrial Renewable Energy | LiTong
seoDescription: Explore Oriental Semiconductor-based solutions for EV motor drives, industrial inverters, and renewable energy systems. Complete system solutions with technical support.

faqs.question: What system solutions does Oriental Semiconductor provide?
faqs.answer: Oriental Semiconductor provides comprehensive system solutions for new energy vehicles, industrial automation, and renewable energy applications. The EV motor drive solution features Oriental's automotive-grade IGBT and SiC modules optimized for high-efficiency motor control in electric vehicles. The industrial drive solution offers complete inverter designs using Oriental IGBT modules for variable frequency drives and servo systems. Both solutions include reference designs, BOM recommendations, application notes, and technical support from Oriental and LiTong's FAE team.
faqs.decisionGuide: Select the solution matching your application area - EV motor drives or industrial inverters. Contact our FAE team for detailed implementation support.

faqs.question: How do I implement Oriental-based solutions in my design?
faqs.answer: Implementing Oriental-based solutions involves several steps: First, review the reference design documentation including schematics, PCB layout, and BOM. Second, evaluate the solution using Oriental's evaluation kits or build a prototype based on the reference design. Third, optimize the design for your specific requirements - adjust power levels, modify control algorithms, or adapt the mechanical layout. Fourth, validate the design through comprehensive testing including electrical, thermal, and EMC testing. LiTong provides comprehensive technical support throughout the implementation process including design review, troubleshooting, and optimization guidance.
faqs.decisionGuide: Start with Oriental reference designs and evaluation kits. Contact our FAE team for implementation support and design review.

faqs.question: How do I get started with Oriental system solutions?
faqs.answer: Getting started with Oriental solutions is straightforward. First, review the solution documentation and reference designs available on our website. Second, contact our sales team to discuss your specific requirements and request evaluation kits. Third, our FAE team can provide design review and optimization guidance throughout your development process.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our sales team to discuss your requirements and request evaluation materials.

faqs.question: What customization options are available for Oriental solutions?
faqs.answer: Oriental solutions can be customized to meet specific application requirements. Customization options include power level adjustments, control algorithm modifications, interface adaptations, and mechanical integration. Our FAE team can work with you to develop customized solutions optimized for your specific needs.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our FAE team to discuss customization requirements for your application.

faqs.question: What is the warranty and support policy for Oriental solutions?
faqs.answer: Oriental products come with standard warranty coverage. LiTong provides comprehensive technical support including design assistance, troubleshooting, and field application support. Extended warranty and support packages are available for high-volume customers. Contact our sales team for detailed warranty and support terms.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our sales team for detailed warranty information and support package options.

solutions.name: EV Motor Drive Solution
solutions.title: EV Motor Drive Solution
solutions.description: High-efficiency motor drive solution for electric vehicles featuring Oriental automotive-grade IGBT and SiC power modules with advanced control algorithms.
solutions.longDescription: The Oriental EV Motor Drive Solution provides a complete powertrain system for electric vehicle applications. This solution combines Oriental's automotive-grade IGBT modules (OIM-A series) and SiC MOSFETs (OSiC series) with optimized gate drivers and control electronics to deliver high-efficiency, high-power-density motor drives. The solution supports power levels from 50kW to 200kW suitable for passenger cars, commercial vehicles, and electric buses. Key features include field-oriented vector control, regenerative braking, and comprehensive protection functions. The modular design allows scaling for different vehicle platforms while maintaining high reliability and meeting automotive quality standards.
features: Automotive-grade IGBT and SiC power modules (AEC-Q101 qualified)
Field-oriented vector control with regenerative braking
Compact liquid-cooled design with high power density
CAN bus communication for vehicle integration

keyComponents.description: Isolated gate driver with protection features

coreAdvantages.title: Automotive-Grade Reliability
coreAdvantages.description: All power modules are AEC-Q101 qualified with full automotive traceability, ensuring 15-year/300,000km lifetime reliability for EV applications.

coreAdvantages.title: High Efficiency
coreAdvantages.description: Advanced IGBT and SiC technology delivers peak efficiency above 97%, extending vehicle range and reducing cooling requirements.

coreAdvantages.title: Scalable Design
coreAdvantages.description: Modular architecture allows easy scaling from 50kW to 200kW using the same control platform and design methodology.

coreAdvantages.title: Comprehensive Protection
coreAdvantages.description: Multi-layer protection including hardware overcurrent, software monitoring, and thermal management ensures safe operation under all conditions.

coreAdvantages.title: Performance Advantage
coreAdvantages.description: Optimized design delivers superior performance and efficiency for demanding applications.

customerCases.challenge: The customer required a 150kW motor drive system with high efficiency, compact size, and automotive-grade reliability for a new electric SUV platform. The solution needed to achieve >95% efficiency at WLTC driving cycle while fitting in limited under-hood space.
customerCases.solution: Implemented the Oriental EV Motor Drive Solution using OIM300A-12E4 IGBT modules in a three-phase bridge configuration. The design featured liquid cooling with integrated cold plate, compact gate driver boards with desaturation protection, and a dual-core DSP control system. Advanced thermal management and optimized switching algorithms maximized efficiency.
customerCases.results: The solution achieved 97.2% peak efficiency and 94.8% average efficiency in WLTC cycle testing. The compact design fit within the space constraints while meeting all automotive EMC and safety requirements. The vehicle achieved 520km range (NEDC), exceeding the target by 8%.

customerCases.challenge: The customer needed a 200kW traction inverter for electric buses operating in hot climates with frequent stop-and-go driving. The inverter required high reliability, easy maintenance, and compatibility with existing vehicle control systems.
customerCases.solution: Deployed a dual-inverter configuration using Oriental OIM300A-12E4 modules with parallel connection for 200kW capability. The solution included redundant cooling systems, modular design for easy service, and CAN bus integration with the vehicle management system. SiC hybrid configuration was used for high-efficiency operation during cruise.
customerCases.results: The traction inverter demonstrated 96.5% efficiency under typical urban driving conditions. The modular design enabled module replacement in under 30 minutes, minimizing downtime. Over 500 buses have been deployed with zero power module failures in 2 years of operation.

faeInsights.insight: The key to successful EV motor drive design lies in balancing efficiency, power density, and reliability. Oriental's automotive-grade modules provide an excellent foundation, but proper system integration is critical. In my experience, thermal management is often the limiting factor - investing in good cooling design pays dividends in reliability and performance. For high-performance EVs, consider the SiC hybrid approach where SiC devices handle high-frequency operation during cruise while IGBTs provide cost-effective high-torque capability during acceleration.
faeInsights.decisionLogic: When designing EV motor drives, first determine your power and efficiency requirements. For systems above 100kW requiring >96% efficiency, consider SiC devices. For cost-sensitive applications below 100kW, IGBT solutions provide excellent value. Always design thermal management for worst-case conditions (hill climb in hot weather) and include adequate safety margins.
keyTakeaways: Thermal management is critical for reliability and performance
SiC provides efficiency benefits but at higher cost - evaluate system-level ROI
Automotive qualification (AEC-Q101) is essential for EV applications
Gate driver design significantly impacts switching performance and protection
Modular design enables scalability and serviceability

选型要点: Match power rating to vehicle requirements
Select SiC for premium efficiency, IGBT for cost optimization
实施建议: Start with reference design and evaluation kit
Validate thermal performance under worst-case conditions

faeInsights.logic: When designing EV motor drives, first determine your power and efficiency requirements. For systems above 100kW requiring >96% efficiency, consider SiC devices. For cost-sensitive applications below 100kW, IGBT solutions provide excellent value. Always design thermal management for worst-case conditions (hill climb in hot weather) and include adequate safety margins.

faqs.question: What is the difference between the IGBT and SiC versions of the EV motor drive solution?
faqs.answer: The IGBT version uses Oriental OIM-A series automotive IGBT modules and is optimized for cost-sensitive applications with switching frequencies of 5-15kHz. It achieves peak efficiency of 95-96% and is suitable for most passenger EV applications. The SiC version uses OSiC series SiC MOSFETs, enabling switching frequencies up to 50kHz with peak efficiency of 97-98%. The SiC version offers higher power density, reduced cooling requirements, and better performance at light loads, but at 2-3x higher cost. Choose IGBT for cost optimization and SiC for maximum efficiency and power density.
faqs.decisionGuide: Choose IGBT version for cost-sensitive applications; select SiC version for premium efficiency and power density requirements.

faqs.question: What safety and protection features are included in the EV motor drive solution?
faqs.answer: The Oriental EV Motor Drive Solution includes comprehensive protection features: Hardware-level protection includes desaturation detection for short-circuit protection (acts within 2-5μs), overcurrent protection through current sensors, overvoltage protection with active clamping, and undervoltage lockout. Software-level protection includes motor over-temperature monitoring, inverter over-temperature protection, over-speed protection, and torque limitation. The system also includes insulation monitoring for high-voltage safety and ISO 26262 functional safety support up to ASIL-D level. All fault conditions trigger safe state transitions with diagnostic logging.
faqs.decisionGuide: The solution provides automotive-grade protection suitable for series production EVs. Customize protection thresholds for your specific application requirements.

faqs.question: What technical support is available for the EV Motor Drive Solution?
faqs.answer: LiTong provides comprehensive technical support for this solution including design consultation, schematic review, PCB layout guidance, and troubleshooting assistance. Our FAE team has extensive experience with Oriental products and can help optimize your design for performance and reliability.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our FAE team for personalized technical support and design guidance.

faqs.question: What is the typical development time for implementing the EV Motor Drive Solution?
faqs.answer: Development time depends on application complexity and team experience. Typically, prototyping takes 2-4 weeks, validation testing takes 4-8 weeks, and production ramp takes 8-12 weeks. Using Oriental's reference designs can significantly accelerate development. Our FAE team can provide detailed project planning assistance.
faqs.decisionGuide: Start with reference designs to accelerate development. Contact us for project planning support.

faqs.question: What evaluation hardware is available for the EV Motor Drive Solution?
faqs.answer: Evaluation kits and reference designs are available to accelerate development. These include complete hardware with pre-programmed control software, documentation, and technical support. Contact our sales team to request evaluation hardware and discuss your specific requirements.
faqs.decisionGuide: Request evaluation kit through our sales team to accelerate your development.

benefits: Automotive-grade IGBT and SiC power modules (AEC-Q101 qualified)
Field-oriented vector control with regenerative braking
Compact liquid-cooled design with high power density
CAN bus communication for vehicle integration

solutions.name: Industrial Drive Solution
solutions.title: Industrial Drive Solution
solutions.description: High-performance variable frequency drive solution for industrial motor control using Oriental IGBT modules with advanced vector control algorithms.
solutions.longDescription: The Oriental Industrial Drive Solution provides a complete variable frequency drive (VFD) platform for industrial motor control applications. This solution leverages Oriental's IGBT modules (OIM series) and discrete IGBTs to deliver reliable, high-efficiency motor drives for pumps, fans, compressors, conveyors, and machine tools. The solution supports power levels from 0.75kW to 200kW with voltage ratings of 220V, 380V, and 690V. Key features include sensorless vector control, V/f control, energy-saving algorithms, and comprehensive protection functions. The proven design has been deployed in thousands of industrial installations worldwide, demonstrating excellent reliability and performance.
features: Sensorless vector control and V/f control modes
Built-in braking unit and DC reactor options
Energy-saving algorithms for pump and fan applications
Comprehensive I/O: analog, digital, communication interfaces

keyComponents.description: Motor control board with ARM MCU
IGBT power stage with gate drivers

technicalSpecs.Protection: Overcurrent, Overvoltage, Undervoltage, Overtemperature, Phase Loss

coreAdvantages.title: Proven Reliability
coreAdvantages.description: Oriental IGBT modules have demonstrated excellent reliability in thousands of industrial installations with MTBF exceeding 100,000 hours.

coreAdvantages.title: High Performance
coreAdvantages.description: Advanced trench-gate technology provides low saturation voltage and fast switching for high-efficiency operation across the entire speed range.

coreAdvantages.title: Flexible Control
coreAdvantages.description: Multiple control modes (V/f, vector, torque) and extensive parameter configuration enable optimization for any application.

coreAdvantages.title: Cost-Effective
coreAdvantages.description: Oriental's competitive pricing combined with high efficiency delivers excellent total cost of ownership for industrial applications.

coreAdvantages.title: Performance Advantage
coreAdvantages.description: Optimized design delivers superior performance and efficiency for demanding applications.

customerCases.challenge: The municipal water treatment plant needed to retrofit 12 pump drives (75kW each) with variable frequency drives to reduce energy consumption. The existing fixed-speed pumps were wasting energy through throttling valves. The solution needed to be reliable, easy to maintain, and compatible with the existing SCADA system.
customerCases.solution: Installed Oriental-based VFDs using OIM200-12E4 IGBT modules in NEMA 12 enclosures. The drives featured built-in PID control for pressure regulation, eliminating the need for external controllers. Energy-saving algorithms optimized pump operation for varying demand conditions. RS485 Modbus communication enabled integration with the existing SCADA system.
customerCases.results: The VFD retrofit achieved 35% average energy savings, reducing annual electricity costs by $45,000. The pressure control improved system stability, reducing water hammer and pipe stress. Payback period was 18 months. The plant has reported zero drive failures in 3 years of operation.

customerCases.challenge: The customer needed high-performance spindle drives for CNC machine tools requiring 15kW continuous power with 150% overload for heavy cutting. The drives needed precise speed control, fast dynamic response, and high reliability for 24/7 production environments.
customerCases.solution: Developed a custom spindle drive solution using Oriental OIG75N120H discrete IGBTs in a compact design. The control system featured sensorless vector control with 150% starting torque and fast torque response. Advanced thermal management and protection features ensured reliable operation. The design included EMI filtering to meet industrial EMC standards.
customerCases.results: The spindle drives achieved ±0.01% speed accuracy and 50ms torque response time. Machine productivity increased 20% due to faster acceleration and higher cutting speeds. The drives have operated continuously for over 2 years with no unplanned downtime. Customer reported improved surface finish quality on machined parts.

faeInsights.insight: Successful industrial drive design requires understanding both the electrical and mechanical aspects of the application. Oriental's IGBT modules provide a solid foundation, but the control algorithm and thermal design determine real-world performance. For pump and fan applications, energy-saving features like automatic energy optimization can reduce power consumption by 30-50% at partial loads. For high-dynamic applications like machine tools, fast current control loops and proper DC bus sizing are critical. Always consider the worst-case operating conditions including high ambient temperatures and overload requirements.
faeInsights.decisionLogic: When designing industrial drives, match the IGBT current rating to the motor's overload requirements, not just the continuous rating. For general-purpose drives, 150% overload for 60s is standard. For heavy-duty applications like cranes or crushers, consider 200% overload capability. Switching frequency is a trade-off between audible noise (lower is noisier), efficiency (lower is more efficient), and current ripple (lower has more ripple).
keyTakeaways: Size IGBTs for overload requirements, not just continuous rating
Optimize switching frequency for your application's noise and efficiency requirements
Energy-saving algorithms provide significant benefits for variable-torque loads
Proper thermal design is critical for long-term reliability
Consider EMI filtering early in the design process

选型要点: Match IGBT current to overload requirements
Select voltage rating based on AC input (2x DC bus)
Choose discrete IGBTs for <15kW, modules for >15kW
实施建议: Validate thermal performance under overload conditions
Implement energy-saving features for pump/fan applications

faeInsights.logic: When designing industrial drives, match the IGBT current rating to the motor's overload requirements, not just the continuous rating. For general-purpose drives, 150% overload for 60s is standard. For heavy-duty applications like cranes or crushers, consider 200% overload capability. Switching frequency is a trade-off between audible noise (lower is noisier), efficiency (lower is more efficient), and current ripple (lower has more ripple).

faqs.question: What is the difference between V/f control and vector control in the industrial drive solution?
faqs.answer: V/f (Volts per Hertz) control maintains a constant ratio between voltage and frequency, providing simple speed control suitable for pumps, fans, and conveyors. It offers good efficiency at rated speed but limited torque at low speeds (typically 20-30% at 5Hz). Vector control (sensorless or with encoder) provides independent control of torque and flux, enabling 150% starting torque at 0.5Hz and precise speed control. Vector control is required for high-dynamic applications like machine tools, cranes, and high-performance conveyors. The Oriental solution supports both modes - use V/f for simple applications and vector control for demanding applications.
faqs.decisionGuide: Use V/f control for pumps, fans, and simple conveyors; use vector control for machine tools, cranes, and high-dynamic applications.

faqs.question: How do I size the IGBT modules for my industrial drive application?
faqs.answer: To size Oriental IGBT modules for industrial drives: First, determine the motor rated current from the motor nameplate or calculate from power and voltage (I = P / (V × √3 × η × pf)). Second, apply an overload factor - for standard duty, use 1.5x rated current; for heavy duty, use 2x rated current. Third, select an IGBT module with current rating equal to or greater than the overload current. For example, a 30kW 380V motor has rated current of approximately 57A; with 150% overload (85A), select OIM200-12E4 (200A) which provides good margin. Consider also the switching frequency - higher frequencies may require derating.
faqs.decisionGuide: Size IGBTs at 1.5-2x motor rated current for overload capability. Contact our FAE team for detailed sizing calculations.
